title: ファインモーション登場！

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This must be a dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm part of the world of racing. I can run with
everything I have! This happiness feels
unreal—like an exquisite dream.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to live out this wonderful dream and
enjoy it to the fullest. Once it's over, I'll take the
abundant memories I make here back home with
me as souvenirs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day Fine Motion starts training in
earnest for her debut in the Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list: First, I want to confirm your current abilities.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Duly noted. ♪ I'll start running, then!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... ♪ One more lap! Hrraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps she was born with innate talent. Her
balanced physical strength and powerful running
style are remarkable. But more than anything...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Phew... ♪ That was delightful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The most enchanting thing about her is the purity
with which she enjoys running. That attitude will
no doubt become a great asset for her. There's
just one thing...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Would it be okay for me to run one more lap? I'm
still not satisfied!
choice_data_list: Let's take a break for now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What? But why? I can still keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to her "unique" circumstances, she's never
trained as a runner before now. Working too hard
off the bat will only lead to injury.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But my legs are crying out! They wish to run! I
implore you to reconsi—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion stumbles slightly and begins to
stagger.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Your Highness!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, Captain...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume in a suit comes rushing to Fine
Motion's aid. This is her bodyguard.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I fear you may have injured yourself. I'll arrange
for a complete medical examination at once.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I assure you that I'm all right. I merely stumbled.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Your Highness, but your well-being is of
the utmost importance. You are irreplaceable.
Your father has made himself quite clear in this
regard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's house is descended from royalty. In
present-day, they live in Ireland, where her father
serves as a high-ranked politician. Fine was
allowed to study abroad on the condition of
staying absolutely safe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I appreciate your concern.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Were you also considering my position when
making your remarks, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Nope, I was only thinking about racing.
Nope, I was only thinking about racing.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
If you push yourself too hard, you won't be able
to run in races.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're right. You're exactly right. I need to enter
races!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I won't try to push myself too hard
again! From now on, I'll do what you tell me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So, Captain... I'd like you to have faith in us as
you watch over me. I promise I will never lose
sight of my circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I am well aware of your astute wisdom, Your
Highness. Please do take care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
One last thing. Could you spare some time once
you've completed your training? A certain
someone would like to speak with you.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. It appears you're making great strides.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Father!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dignified man displayed on the computer
monitor is none other than Fine Motion's father.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
I expect my official duties will make opportunities
for us to converse like this infrequent. As such, I
wished to speak with you... and your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you are already well aware, Fine has
responsibilities that prevent her from doing as she
pleases.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
However, she has satisfactorily demonstrated her
talent to me, and I have in return granted her
three years in which she can act freely.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
That being said, when our house arrived in Ireland
all those years ago, we were welcomed with
warmth and a new home.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, Trainer, I wish to ask—are you
prepared to watch over and guide my daughter?

text_block_list.name: Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's father looks at me intently with
eyes just like hers. Yet even in the face of fatherly
apprehension, I stand firm on my decision.
choice_data_list:
I'll do everything in my power to support her
dream!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
...Make sure you never forget those words. Fine,
heed your trainer's guidance, and run to your
heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text: I'll be watching over you from afar.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Sorry about that. And... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
For joining me for some ramen! I ran so much
during today's training that I'm simply famished.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I almost forgot! Now that you have my
father's blessing, I'd like to say this again.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I expect great things from our partnership these
next three years. I'm looking forward to working
with you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I know a great place nearby! They have ramen
made with sardine stock...

text_block_list.name: Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Unlike other Umamusume, Fine Motion is
beginning her career with a strict time limit in
place. All I can do is—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Trainer! The ramen is waiting! ♪

text_block_list.name: Trainer
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is support her—someone who smiles
joyously at something as simple as going to eat
ramen, and try to make every moment one that
she'll never forget.
